actions.title: Negotiate or find cheaper housing
actions.description: Your rent is extremely high relative to your income, causing a large negative cash flow. Explore options to negotiate rent reduction, move to a more affordable place, or find a roommate to share costs.
actions.implementation: Contact your landlord to discuss rent options, research affordable housing alternatives, or list a room for rent.

actions.title: Reduce weekend impulse spending
actions.description: You spend over 1100 EUR on weekends, driven by impulse behavior. Set a strict weekend spending budget and track expenses to reduce impulse purchases.
actions.implementation: Use a spending tracker app, plan weekend activities that cost less or are free, and avoid carrying excess cash or cards.

actions.title: Cut utility expenses by energy and water saving
actions.description: Electricity and water bills are high. Implement energy-saving habits and water conservation to reduce bills.
actions.implementation: Turn off lights/appliances when not in use, fix leaks, use water-efficient fixtures, and reduce heating/cooling use.

actions.title: Downgrade or bundle internet service
actions.description: Your internet cost is 110 EUR monthly, which might be optimized by switching to a cheaper plan or bundling with other services.
actions.implementation: Compare internet plans and providers, negotiate current plan, or bundle with phone/TV services for discounts.

utilityAnomalyDetector.summaryMessage: Electricidad increased 23.5% — review the contract or supplier.

nudges: When you feel the urge to spend impulsively, take a 5-minute pause timer and write down what emotion you are experiencing before deciding.
Use an implementation intention like 'If I feel the impulse to buy, then I will take three deep breaths to calm myself before acting.'
Keep a brief emotion journal noting the triggers and feelings around each impulse spend to increase awareness and reduce automatic reactions.
nudges_es: Cuando sientas el impulso de gastar de forma impulsiva, pon un temporizador de 5 minutos y anota qué emoción estás experimentando antes de decidir.
Usa una intención de implementación como 'Si siento el impulso de comprar, entonces tomaré tres respiraciones profundas para calmarme antes de actuar.'
Lleva un diario breve de emociones donde anotes los desencadenantes y sentimientos alrededor de cada gasto impulsivo para aumentar la conciencia y reducir reacciones automáticas.
